data.title: Cooper Zelnick appointed CEO of Groups, strengthening leadership in addiction care. #businessnews
data.description: Business entity Groups has revealed the promotion of Cooper Zelnick to the position of Chief Executive Officer in New York.

data.title: Hexnode introduces XDR and DEX solutions, along with UEM enhancements at HexCon25; Founder & CEO Apu Pavithran explains the company's vision.
data.description: A technology conference named HexCon25 was recently hosted in Georgia by Hexnode, an enterprise software division of Mitsogo. The event commenced on September 17, 2025, and saw the participation of numerous industry professionals and enthusiasts. Apu Pavithran, the Founder and CEO, delivered the opening speech, focusing on the growth and future plans of Hexnode. He introduced innovative products and enhancements aimed at revolutionizing enterprise device management. During the conference, Rachana Vijayan, the Chief Marketing Officer and Director of Sales & Partnerships, showcased new collaborative features beneficial for partners and customers. The event aimed to provide valuable insights and networking opportunities for the attendees.
Dallas Fed Survey: Costs among oilfield service firms rose in Q3 of 2025 vs Q2 of 2025.

data.title: Reserve and CF Benchmarks launch Large Cap Index DTF (LCAP) tracking over 90% of crypto market cap, trade on Kraken.
data.description: A pioneering institutional-grade index token is set to be traded on Kraken as Reserve, a prominent platform for Decentralized Token Folios (DTFs), introduces the Large Cap Index DTF (LCAP). This marks a significant development in the industry, offering investors access to a carefully curated index. The token's availability on Kraken signals a notable milestone in the market, showcasing the growing interest in digital assets. With this launch, investors can engage with a diversified portfolio through LCAP, highlighting the evolution of blockchain-based investments.

data.title: Over 300 attendees gather at Newport premiere of education reform documentary, "Multiple Choice", by producer Ted Dintersmith.
data.description: Last week, over 300 individuals comprising educators, workforce leaders, and community members convened at Salve Regina University in Newport, Rhode Island for the debut of "Multiple Choice," a documentary by renowned producer Ted Dintersmith. The premiere was hosted by newportFILM.
Dallas Fed Survey: Companies expect a West Texas intermediate oil price of $63 per barrel at year-end 2025.
Dallas Fed Survey: Oil companies expect Henry Hub natural gas prices of $3.30 per million British thermal units (mmbtu) at year-end of 2025.
Dallas Fed Energy Survey

data.title: Solana is dropping more than Bitcoin, Ethereum, and XRP due to deleveraging, corporate purchases, and FTX distributions.
data.description: This week, Solana has shown lower performance compared to Bitcoin, Ethereum, and XRP. Analysts attribute this underperformance to deleveraging pressure, corporate purchases already factored into the price, and the impending FTX distributions.

data.title: Land id™ chosen to help sell Triple Creek Reserve, showcasing Idaho's premier outdoor community. ~120 homesites sold.
data.description: The group managing the one-of-a-kind master planned community selected Land id to showcase the vast opportunities of this developing lifestyle hub in BOZEMAN, Mont. On Sept. 24, 2025, Land id, a software company specializing in property information and mapping, was engaged to enhance communication for this project.

data.title: 1st Commercial Credit funds Brazilian produce exporter selling to U.S. buyers, facilitated successful transaction.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on September 24, 2025, 1st Commercial Credit, a prominent company offering receivables-based financing solutions, has disclosed the completion of a funding agreement for a Brazilian produce exporter. This exporter supplies fresh fruit and vegetables to buyers in the United States. The successful transaction marks a significant step in boosting international trade and collaboration between the two countries, with specific focus on the agricultural sector. Through this financing deal, the Brazilian exporter can continue its operations smoothly while catering to the demands of U.S. consumers. The support provided by 1st Commercial Credit underscores their commitment to facilitating global business partnerships.
Key Russia black Sea oil ports pause loading after drone alerts.

data.title: AAVE price stabilizes at $278 with governance changes & Q4 upgrades for improved DeFi lending efficiency.
data.description: The cryptocurrency AAVE is currently trading at a value of $278.54, experiencing minimal movement over the past 24 hours. This stability in price comes as the governance of AAVE has decided to decrease emissions, and upcoming upgrades in Q4 are expected to improve the efficiency of the protocol for decentralized finance (DeFi) lending.

data.title: Canadian businesses are turning to AI-powered project management tools amid uncertainty, according to Capterra survey.
data.description: Businesses in Canada are increasingly turning to AI-driven project management tools to maximize their efficiency amidst staffing reductions, constrained finances, and accelerated project schedules.

data.title: Clayton® launches TRU® ORIGIN Collection of Homes, promising quality and affordability, on Sept. 24, 2025.
data.description: Clayton Home Building Group® has introduced a new line of modern manufactured TRU homes called TRU ORIGIN, aiming to provide streamlined construction, quality, and affordability for buyers. The collection was unveiled on September 24, 2025, in MARYVILLE, Tenn. This initiative by the national single-family home builder is set to offer accessible housing options, with an emphasis on contemporary design and construction practices.

data.title: Law firm investigating Quanex Building Products investors with losses over $75,000. Contact for more details.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who have incurred losses surpassing $75,000 in Quanex to get in touch with him directly to explore potential courses of action. If you experienced losses exceeding $75,000 in Quanex during the period from December 12, 2024, to September 5, 2025...

data.title: Designs for Health introduces Anaerostipes Probiotic, delivers butyrate, microbiome support. | PALM COAST, Fla., Sept. 24, 2025.
data.description: A cutting-edge probiotic with ClostraBio's Anaerostipes caccae CLB101™ offers enhanced butyrate production, diversity support for microbiome, and reinforcement of gut barrier strength. This advanced probiotic was unveiled in Palm Coast, Florida on September 24, 2025, by Designs for Health®. Known for endorsing health practitioners and being the favored brand, this probiotic represents a significant step forward in promoting gut health.

data.title: AI study by Acosta Group shows its impact on grocery sales, trust, and expectations. Released ahead of Groceryshop 2025.
data.description: A recent study conducted by Acosta Group in Jacksonville, Florida, has uncovered insights into the impact of artificial intelligence (AI) on consumer behavior in the grocery and retail sectors. The study, released on September 24, 2025, just ahead of Groceryshop 2025, sheds light on how AI technology is shaping purchase decisions, trust levels, and expectations among shoppers. The findings highlight the increasing influence of AI in guiding consumer choices, with significant implications for businesses in these industries.

data.title: Inventor from Redding, Calif., creates new horse feeder device to feed horses when ranchers are away.
data.description: In a recent development in Pittsburgh on September 24, 2025, an inventor from Redding, California shared insights on a new creation called the HORSE FEEDER. The inventor expressed their motivation stating a desire to enhance the design of a horse feeder. The innovative HORSE FEEDER is designed to dispense feed to horses even in the absence of ranchers. Additionally, it boasts easy construction processes for convenience. This new invention aims to revolutionize horse care practices, benefiting ranchers and their animals.
